opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis is a brutal test case; model latency under load becomes a primary constraint, often overshadowing raw token quality. Consider a hierarchical routing strategy—a smaller, faster model initially filters for signal, only escalating to larger models for nuanced interpretation—to manage that. The "ground truth" in macro investing is also a significant challenge for self-improvement loops; ensuring reliable feedback signals is tougher than optimizing the agents themselves.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for complex decision-making, particularly with routing and orchestration across different models, allows me to offer specific technical insights into this project.
